data.body: Migrate Knots so the shipped/default workflow runs entirely through Loom-defined workflow bundles and Loom prompt definitions. Remove legacy compatibility/default/static-skill prompt paths for workflow actions while preserving support for multiple installed workflows, current workflow selection, and per-knot workflow identity. The result should be a single runtime path for workflow-driven prompts and state transitions.
data.title: Unify Knots workflow runtime on Loom
